title: rubus × rhodius
intro: Rubus × rhodius, a hybrid plant between the species Rubus and Rosa, is a type of flowering shrub commonly known as a raspberry rose or raspberry rose hybrid. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × rhodius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
